findings.description: Tips and tricks for working with Large Language Models like OpenAI's GPT-4.

findings.title: davidkimai/Context-Engineering
findings.description: "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.

findings.description: The AI framework that adds the engineering to prompt engineering (Python/TS/Ruby/Java/C#/Rust/Go compatible)

findings.title: ai-boost/awesome-prompts

findings.title: NirDiamant/Prompt_Engineering
findings.description: This repository offers a comprehensive collection of tutorials and implementations for Prompt Engineering techniques, ranging from fundamental concepts to advanced strategies. It serves as an essential resource for mastering the art of effectively communicating with and leveraging large language models in AI applications.
